author: codex

patch.value: pm validate reported missing_linked_paths for test/generator.test.mjs (deleted in TypeScript migration) and dist (directory path not resolved by pm validate). Fixed by updating files references to correct paths.
Fix stale file path references in pm items (mjs → ts, dist → dist/cli.js)
Keep pm item file references in sync with actual repo file paths to avoid pm validate warnings about missing linked paths.
pm validate reports missing_linked_paths_count: 0; no test/generator.test.mjs or bare dist references in pm items.

value.author: codex
value.text: pm validate --json showed missing_linked_paths: [dist, test/generator.test.mjs]. Fixed by editing toon files and re-registering with pm update --note --force.

value.author: codex
value.text: Caused by TypeScript migration that renamed test/generator.test.mjs to test/generator.test.ts in earlier session.

value.author: codex
value.text: Always update pm item file references when renaming files. pm validate files check catches stale paths. Use pm update --file to add references (it appends, not replaces, so direct toon edits are sometimes needed).

message: Update three pm items with stale file references: test/generator.test.mjs → test/generator.test.ts in pmc-91po and pmc-2lzr; dist → dist/cli.js in pmc-l9z0.

patch.value: Updated file references; pm validate missing_linked_paths_count is 0.
pm validate missing_linked_paths_count: 0; all functional checks pass.
File references corrected; pm validate missing_linked_paths_count is 0.
